title: MC:SM Ultimate Experience Refresh!
description: "Nothing built can last forever" Most accurate to Minecraft Story Mode modpack! Contains things like:Craftable Command Block, Wither Storm, armors from MC:SM, and even animated eyes and eyebrows for the player!
body:
![Gangi Blocky Projects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1eaa20e3016d08dee70296fc3171fbb795c39b6.png)
# Nothing built can last forever...
Hi! It's me. Gangi. I'm presenting to you... 
**the most accurate to Minecraft: Story Mode modpack!**
It's a total remake of my old MC:SM modpack.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_Previously called MC:SM Ultimate Experience REBORN_

</details>

![Wither Storm!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/374891fc49955196f0fb8c802c14960f8e806ea4.png)

### Consider Donating To My PayPal! It really helps me to keep up the good work!

## BEFORE YOU PLAY

1 . Change Keybinds

2 . When creating a world you can set the world generation to "Moderner Beta" and then **Farlands** will appear! They start to generate at (coordinates) 12,550,821

3 . It's recommended to download this map: [Minecraft: Story Mode - 1:1 Recreation](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/mcsm-rebuilt-in-minecraft/) (Play on it for fun!)

4 . Use Programmer Art Texture Pack for better experience!

5 . Read this [Fresh Moves Wiki](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki) then use this! [Fresh Moves Skin Editor](https://itch.io/embed-upload/11245192?uuid=c19ebadea5131a0dff129b21acc758e7&color=333333)
